creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 203614
update net-im/py-matrix-synapse to 0.99.3

I've bumped the version of this to 0.99.3, the current release of synapse. Despite the obvious version bump, I've ensured that the correct version of trials is called for the test command.


We should really get this thing committed, since the 1.0 release is getting closer and our users will need to switch to valid certificates. The only show stopper, as far as I can tell, is the security/py-pymacaroons-pynacl port, which is still outdated.
